name: git-go
description: Visual representation of your Git repository, with actions to manage commits, branches, stashes, and tags.

git-go.autoOpen.enabled.description: Automatically open Git Go when VS Code opens in a git repository.

git-go.autoOpen.pinTab.description: Automatically pin the Git Go tab when opened.

git-go.branch.create.checkout.description: Default value for 'Checkout new branch' when creating a branch.

git-go.branch.delete.force.description: Default value for 'Force delete' when deleting a branch.

git-go.branch.push.setUpstream.description: Default value for 'Set upstream' when pushing a branch.

git-go.branch.rebase.ignoreDate.description: Default value for 'Ignore date' when rebasing a branch.

git-go.merge.fastForwardIfPossible.description: Default value for 'Fast forward if possible' when merging branches.

git-go.merge.squash.description: Default value for 'Squash commits' when merging branches.

git-go.merge.noCommit.description: Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when merging branches.

git-go.cherryPick.recordOrigin.description: Default value for 'Record origin' when cherry-picking commits.

git-go.cherryPick.noCommit.description: Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when cherry-picking commits.

git-go.revert.noCommit.description: Default value for 'Don't commit automatically' when reverting commits.

git-go.remote.fetch.forceFetch.description: Default value for 'Force fetch' when fetching remote branches into local branches.

git-go.stash.includeUntracked.description: Default value for 'Include untracked files' when creating stashes.

git-go.graph.rounded.description: Use rounded corners for all commit graph elements.

scripts.build: pnpm run compile && cd panel && pnpm run build
